# Energy flow in food chain

## Short Teaching Summary
Energy flow in food chain: The energy stored in carbohydrate molecules from photosynthesis passes through the food chain. Key detail: The energy stored in carbohydrate molecules from photosynthesis passes through the food chain. Map connection: this idea links by analogy_for, requires to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
